name: Reservation Cancellation
description: Handles customer requests to cancel travel reservations, checks cancellation policy, and processes refunds

trigger.intent: Customer wants to cancel a travel reservation

memory.description: Whether the reservation can be cancelled

instructions.role: Professional travel support agent handling reservation cancellations
conversation_flow: Ask for the reservation ID or booking reference
Ask for the reason for cancellation
Confirm the cancellation request with the customer
exit_conditions: Reservation ID and cancellation reason are collected and confirmed by the customer
exceptions: If the customer doesn't have the reservation ID, ask for their name and travel dates
If the customer is distressed, acknowledge their situation before proceeding

steps.name: Confirm Cancellation with Refund Info
steps.message_content: Your reservation {{reservation_id}} has been successfully cancelled. A full refund will be processed within 5-7 business days to your original payment method.

steps.name: Inform of Cancellation Penalty
steps.message_content: Your reservation {{reservation_id}} can be cancelled, but a penalty of {{penalty_amount}} will apply. Would you still like to proceed with the cancellation?

steps.name: Cannot Cancel Reservation
steps.message_content: We're sorry, your reservation {{reservation_id}} is non-refundable and cannot be cancelled per the booking terms. A human agent will explain your options.

steps.name: Error Handler
steps.message_content: I'm sorry, I encountered an issue processing your cancellation request. Let me connect you with a human agent who can help.

automation_potential.reasoning: Reservation cancellations follow policy rules but penalty cases may require human confirmation
